title: Vestian is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Vestian is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Vestian in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vestian:
Vestian is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vestian!
